entries.visual_character: Horizontal row of connected rounded rectangles with chevron arrows between them. The default Basic Process layout.
entries.max_label_chars_rationale: First-pass default per category norms. Refine after manual gate validation.
when_to_use: Pipelines with a definite start and end
entries.selector_rationale_template: process1 is the right choice when the content has {n} process items from "{first}" to "{last}". Delivers editable SmartArt — speaker can add/rename items in PowerPoint after delivery.

integration.replaces_custom_svg_when: graphic_type in (flowchart) AND enrichment_tier == 'pure_programmatic' AND node_count within [2, 9] AND max(label_length) <= 24

entries.visual_character: Circles arranged in a ring with directional arrows connecting each to the next. Flows clockwise from a 12-o-clock starting position.
entries.max_label_chars_rationale: First-pass default per category norms. Refine after manual gate validation.
when_not_to_use: Linear sequences with a definite end (use Process)
entries.selector_rationale_template: cycle2 is the right choice when the content has {n} cycle items from "{first}" to "{last}". Delivers editable SmartArt — speaker can add/rename items in PowerPoint after delivery.

integration.replaces_custom_svg_when: graphic_type in (cycle) AND enrichment_tier == 'pure_programmatic' AND node_count within [3, 8] AND max(label_length) <= 20

entries.visual_character: Classic organization chart — root node at top, subordinates branching downward in a tree. Assistant nodes render sideways with a distinctive right-angle connector.
entries.max_label_chars_rationale: First-pass default per category norms. Refine after manual gate validation.
when_not_to_use: Flat lists of peers (use List or Process)
More than ~25 total nodes or ~4 levels deep
entries.selector_rationale_template: orgChart1 is the right choice when the content describes a hierarchy tree of {n} nodes. Delivers editable SmartArt — speaker can restructure the tree in PowerPoint after delivery.

integration.replaces_custom_svg_when: graphic_type in (org_chart) AND enrichment_tier == 'pure_programmatic' AND node_count within [3, 25] AND max(label_length) <= 32

entries.visual_character: Basic bulleted list — items stacked vertically with minimal visual treatment. Good for unordered collections.
entries.max_label_chars_rationale: First-pass default per category norms. Refine after manual gate validation.
when_to_use: Collections of related points without a specific order
Feature lists, benefit summaries, key takeaways
Items where emphasis matters more than sequence
when_not_to_use: Data with quantitative values (use a chart)
entries.selector_rationale_template: list1 is the right choice when the content has {n} list items from "{first}" to "{last}". Delivers editable SmartArt — speaker can add/rename items in PowerPoint after delivery.

integration.replaces_custom_svg_when: graphic_type in (list) AND enrichment_tier == 'pure_programmatic' AND node_count within [2, 8] AND max(label_length) <= 30

entries.visual_character: Four-quadrant matrix with items arranged in a 2x2 grid. Classic decision-matrix layout.
entries.max_label_chars_rationale: First-pass default per category norms. Refine after manual gate validation.
when_to_use: Comparing four categories along two dimensions
when_not_to_use: Sequences or hierarchies (use Process or Hierarchy)
More than 4 quadrants (no matrix layout fits)
Sparse grids (use a List or table)
entries.selector_rationale_template: matrix2 is the right choice when the content has {n} matrix items from "{first}" to "{last}". Delivers editable SmartArt — speaker can add/rename items in PowerPoint after delivery.

integration.replaces_custom_svg_when: graphic_type in (matrix) AND enrichment_tier == 'pure_programmatic' AND node_count within [4, 4] AND max(label_length) <= 30

entries.visual_character: Pyramid with tiered levels — bigger ideas at the wider end, detail at the narrower. Hierarchy of importance.
entries.max_label_chars_rationale: First-pass default per category norms. Refine after manual gate validation.
when_to_use: Prioritised content where the biggest idea sits at one end
entries.selector_rationale_template: pyramid2 is the right choice when the content has {n} pyramid items from "{first}" to "{last}". Delivers editable SmartArt — speaker can add/rename items in PowerPoint after delivery.

integration.replaces_custom_svg_when: graphic_type in (pyramid) AND enrichment_tier == 'pure_programmatic' AND node_count within [3, 6] AND max(label_length) <= 30

entries.visual_character: Picture list — each list item includes an image placeholder alongside text. When paired with our image generation pipeline, speakers can request AI-generated illustrations per item.
entries.max_label_chars_rationale: First-pass default per category norms. Refine after manual gate validation.
when_to_use: Visual-first content where each item has an illustrative image
Product showcases, team photos, concept illustrations
Speaker wants to combine structured text with AI-generated imagery
when_not_to_use: Decks rendered without image generation budget
Microsites or PDF-only output (images may not transfer cleanly)
entries.selector_rationale_template: pList1 is the right choice when the content has {n} picture items from "{first}" to "{last}". Delivers editable SmartArt — speaker can add/rename items in PowerPoint after delivery.

integration.replaces_custom_svg_when: graphic_type in (picture_list) AND enrichment_tier == 'pure_programmatic' AND node_count within [2, 7] AND max(label_length) <= 30

entries.visual_character: Default placeholder layout — uncategorised. Not intended for production use.
entries.max_label_chars_rationale: First-pass default per category norms. Refine after manual gate validation.
when_not_to_use: Use a more specific category layout
entries.selector_rationale_template: default is the right choice when the content has {n} other items from "{first}" to "{last}". Delivers editable SmartArt — speaker can add/rename items in PowerPoint after delivery.

integration.replaces_custom_svg_when: graphic_type in (no mapped graphic_type) AND enrichment_tier == 'pure_programmatic' AND node_count within [2, 10] AND max(label_length) <= 30
